messaging_angles: Social proof (15M+ global clients, thousands of UK users)
Speed and accessibility (24/7 trading, fast deposits/withdrawals)
messaging_analysis.buy_crypto_framing: direct — Strong emphasis on 'start trading today,' 'begin with just £10,' and immediate funding options. The messaging is action-oriented with clear trading and buying focus throughout.
messaging_analysis.fees_messaging: Completely avoided — no mention of fees, commissions, or cost structure in any ad copy. Focus is entirely on ease of access and variety.
messaging_analysis.simplicity_messaging: Strongly emphasized through multiple vectors: 'Quickly fund,' 'Easily connect,' 'Start small,' 'No pressure,' 'Just an easy way to test the waters,' and streamlined deposit/withdrawal messaging. Simplicity is a core pillar.
messaging_analysis.security_messaging: Minimal but present — Only one ad (Ad 14) mentions 'Industry-leading security' and being '#1 ranked by Kaiko.' Security is generally implied through social proof (15M+ users) rather than explicitly stated.
messaging_analysis.dominant_format: carousel — 100% of ads use carousel format
longest_running_themes: Social proof + UK bank integration (217-249 days: Ads emphasizing 15M+ clients, Plaid/PayPal funding, UK bank connectivity)
Simple deposit/withdraw messaging (218-240 days: Short-form 'UK traders: deposit & withdraw' messaging)
Wide crypto selection with user numbers (248 days: '1,000+ crypto markets, 13M+ users, 275+ cryptocurrencies')
messaging_analysis.summary: Kraken's ad strategy is heavily UK-localized, focusing on removing friction through easy funding options (Plaid, PayPal, IBAN) and emphasizing massive scale (15M+ users, 430+ cryptos) as social proof. The approach is direct about trading with minimal barrier ('start with £10'), while deliberately avoiding fee discussions and relying on ease-of-use and trust-through-popularity rather than explicit security messaging.
